rawAssistant:
Moonlight casts a silver glow upon the well, its surface reflecting the mist that rises from the ground. I sense a calm presence before me, as if the well itself is soothing my concerns. The bond between your creatures and you has been carefully balanced, and now it's time to consider how those bonds might influence their evolution.

In the world of Hollowfen, monster trust is woven into the very fabric of our existence – old moonwell rites teach us that a creature's heart beats in harmony with its pack. When a bond forms between a trainer and their monster, it can shape the way they grow and change. The trust you've built with Thornbeast and Gremlin will continue to guide them on their journey, influencing how they adapt to new challenges and overcome obstacles.

Come, let us sit by the well's edge and discuss how this bond might manifest in your creatures' futures. I'll share my knowledge of moonwell rites, passed down through generations of keepers like myself, and help you understand how your relationship with Thornbeast and Gremlin can unlock new paths for them to grow.
